/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/FLStudioEditor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/core/Project.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/audio/AudioEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/audio/Synthesizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/audio/Scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/audio/DrumSample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/audio/WavExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/PianoRollWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/StepSequencerWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/MixerWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/TransportWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/InstrumentEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/ui/PianoKeyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLStudioEditor.dir/src/utils/AudioBuffer.cpp.o -o FLStudioEditor  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
